summary: Iteration 43 testing complete. All new features verified: Split tracking tabs (Live/Won/Lost/Pushed/Insights) working correctly, Calibration Insights panel loads and displays data from /api/calibration/insights endpoint, notification click routing correctly routes to appropriate tabs (hit->won, miss->lost, push->pushed).
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Tracking tabs correctly split into Live | Won | Lost | Pushed | Insights (5 tabs)
VERIFIED: Won tab filters picks with result='hit' only (NOT pushes)
VERIFIED: Lost tab filters picks with result='miss' only
VERIFIED: Pushed tab filters picks with result='push' only (shows empty state when no pushes)
VERIFIED: Insights tab loads calibration data from /api/calibration/insights endpoint
VERIFIED: Calibration panel shows System Learning Summary (analyzed count, total misses, active fixes)
VERIFIED: Per-prop calibration cards show sport, prop type, miss count, avg error, bias, correction
VERIFIED: Basketball Points has active +15% correction (4 misses, consistent bias)
VERIFIED: Refresh Insights button works correctly
VERIFIED: Notification click routing: hit->won, miss->lost, push->pushed (line 1144 in App.js)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified new tracking tab split and calibration insights features. Current data: 14 hits, 6 misses, 0 pushes. Calibration system has 3 prop types tracked (basketball points with active +15% correction, basketball rebounds, soccer saves). No J. Savarino push found in current data - may have been deleted or the user mentioned it from a different account/time period.
